parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap is sequence integrity: one version preserves setup, development, and payoff, while the other places dependent units out of order, severing antecedents and turning transitions into collisions.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Summaries and conclusions arrive before supporting passages; subsection headings trail their material, pronouns lose antecedents, and the chapter closes by restarting its opening. Individual images retain force, but the reading sequence is unusable.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A concrete animal vignette expands into instinct, industrial processing, health consequences, a shopping exercise, and perceptual bias in a legible arc. Repeated questions, capitalized slogans, and an extended health-warning section sometimes blunt the otherwise steady momentum.
